data.content: Plan approved for implementation. The proposed scope matches the current code paths: scanned selection state in settings-agents-hooks must expand from one selected option id per scanned CLI to many; settings-agents-scanned and settings-agents-section must remove row-level Add/registered affordances and Add All, show scanned.path under the label, convert the chooser to searchable multi-select with selected-model badges on the row, and restyle the section Add/Scan buttons. The Codex rename is correctly scoped to the settings identity/display layer and should include direct vendor-label consumers such as agent-info-bar while avoiding unrelated analytics/storage uses of literal openai keys. Test coverage is adequate if implementation updates the identified scan/settings/component suites and then runs bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run test in the implementation worktree.
